title: Data Strategy Consultant
description: VML MAP (WPP) is looking for a Data Strategy Consultant to help world-class brands use marketing and customer data to drive revenue growth. The role covers customer data & audience strategy, experimentation & measurement frameworks, and technology & data architecture enablement. Requires strong consulting skills, data expertise (Python/R, cloud platforms, CRM/marketing data), and ideally 3-5 years in a data consultant role. Platforms: Salesforce Marketing Cloud, Adobe Experience Cloud, Braze, BigQuery.
match_reasons: Python/R data analysis|Consulting internship at IQVIA (audience segmentation, social listening, client delivery)|Data translation and stakeholder communication|AI/ML applied experience|Genuine motivation to return to consulting
gaps: No marketing data / CRM platform experience (Salesforce, Adobe, Braze)|No multi-touch attribution experience|3-5 years requirement vs 3-month internship|No BigQuery or cloud marketing stack experience
